description: Equip the Pasubio bus fleet in the Bologna scenario (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/) with battery devices (capacity 50000, initial charge 10000). Deploy a 200 kW fast-charger named 'fast_charger_1' (startPos 0, endPos 20) at the first bus stop location found in the scenario files and schedule a 120-second charging stop for the bus. Run the simulation using run.sumocfg and extract the final actualBatteryCapacity from the last timestep of the battery output. Save the numeric value to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/battery_report.txt.
